name: How is fault determined for my back injury at work in Idaho?
description: No-fault in Idaho workers' comp—if work-related, covered.

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined for my back injury at work in Idaho?

acceptedAnswer.text: No-fault in Idaho workers' comp—if work-related, covered.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Workers' comp is no-fault; you get benefits regardless of blame if work-related.**

Idaho system covers injuries arising from employment without proving employer fault.[2] Third parties can be sued separately.

- Focus on 'arising out of' work.
- No comparative negligence bar.
- Intentional employer acts allow suits.

Report and file; attorney handles causation proof.[2] Simplifies back claims.
